training_status: Lifts 4x per week, has always worked out
health_conditions: cancer survivor (no evidence of disease currently)

benefits.description: Added muscle mass over a year while down from 140lbs to 118lbs

side_effects.description: No facial hair or adverse masculinizing side effects from testosterone cream

protocol_notes: Age 62. Started at tanked testosterone levels. Now runs ~90 ng/dL testosterone and feels best at that level. Testosterone cream from compounding pharmacy, dosed and monitored by functional medicine doctor with bloodwork every 3 months the first year. Avoids growth hormones due to cancer history. Started GHK-cu in October, added MOTS-c and TA1 in December. Gets bloodwork checked frequently due to prior cancer type.
